anchors.operator_authorization_phrase_p2: Authorize s13 D1 MNQ.c.0 P2 phase-2 plan only. Anchor to s13-d1 SEAL 262491c and P1 plan-lock 005cb8a. Carry DA3=B, DA4=C, K9-reachability discipline, and REC1-equivalent OOS K9 disclosure as binding into C6 inherited_constraints_block.

c1_live_mode_refusal.description: Algorithm refuses to run in live mode at Initialize. Output JSONs carry explicit trading and live status markers.
c1_live_mode_refusal.required_initialize_block: if self.LiveMode: raise Exception("LIVE_PATH_DETECTED: s13-d1-mnq-c0-single-instrument-rsi-2-bi-directional is paper-only forever; refuse to run in live mode.")

asset_class_conditional_counters_s13_d1_.atr_stop_breach_count: NEW s13-d1-specific (disclosure; whipsaw signature for RSI mean-reversion)

all_safety_warnings_zero.required: True iff all applicable counters are 0

c4_rth_execution_discipline.limit_order_discipline_s13_d1: NOT_APPLICABLE at P6 CSV-simulator level (daily-bar fills atomic)

c5_corporate_action_event_risk_contract.rationale: MNQ.c.0 is continuous front-month futures synthesized vendor-side by Databento (stype_in=continuous). Futures do NOT have stock splits, dividends, or option-style corporate actions. Quarterly roll vendor-side.

c6_inherited_constraints_block_LOAD_BEAR: REC1-equivalent (BINDING): OOS K9 reachable at lower bound with thin margin (~50-65 trades/year vs 50/year floor). If observed IS rate falls below 25/year on RSI(2) bi-directional, OOS K9 unreachability becomes structurally probable. The s9 RSI-2 baseline observed 414 trades over long-only 4-ETF window; if MNQ.c.0 bi-directional rate falls below half that proportional rate, OOS K9 fires. If OOS K9 fires, the OOS verdict shall be OOS_INSUFFICIENT_SAMPLE or PARKED_SAFE_BUT_OOS_INDETERMINATE analogous to S10-D2 P11 PARK at 23c7164 and s12-d1 P11 park at ecbd001. The chain shall NOT relax K9 at OOS; the appropriate response is to seal the INSUFFICIENT_SAMPLE / INDETERMINATE verdict and park the candidate. Pursuing s13-d1 accepts the structural possibility of an OOS PARK outcome if the IS rate falls below the DRAFT-estimated 50-65/y band.
DA3=B (BINDING): per-trade risk pct = 0.005 (0.5%); REVISED at SEAL from default 1.0% for DR3 mitigation (s9 RSI lineage cost-erosion precedent)
DA4=C (BINDING): START_CASH_USD = 200000 ($200k); REVISED at SEAL from default $100k for DR10 mitigation (high-frequency turnover); halves per-dollar cost pressure
K9-reachability discipline (NEW framework standard from selection-plan revision 0e3f9d4) applied at PLAN + DRAFT + SEAL + P1 + P2; binding for all subsequent phases
K9_THRESHOLD_INVIOLATE: closed_trades >= 100; no relaxation at any phase
Mechanic family F3 RSI(2) bi-directional mean-reversion LOCKED at PLAN; no reopening at DRAFT/SEAL
RSI thresholds 10/50/90/50 LOCKED at PLAN; threshold modification post-SEAL FORBIDDEN per RF13
DR3 risk ELEVATED (RSI lineage s9 falsification precedent); mitigated via DA3=B
DR10 risk ELEVATED (high-frequency turnover ~50-65 trades/y); mitigated via DA4=C ($200k START_CASH)
s12-d1 terminal park (PARKED_SAFE_BUT_INSUFFICIENT_SAMPLE_AT_IS at ecbd001) preserved unchanged
All parallel-session shorter-path sealed artifacts byte-stable; not anchored by this chain
Expected terminal verdict if OOS K9 fires: PARKED_SAFE_BUT_OOS_INDETERMINATE_K9_FIRED (analogous to S10-D2 P11 PARK)
P2 PASS does NOT imply READY_FOR_LONGER_BACKTEST; requires P6 IS diagnostic under separate authorization
P2 PASS NEVER implies live-readiness; 6-gate live-block applies regardless of any verdict
required_top_level_fields_universal: title (must mention paper-research-only + diagnostic-only + secondary label)
inherited_constraints_block (MUST include REC1-equivalent + DA3=B + DA4=C + K9-reachability verbatim binding)

c7_verdict_semantics.never_live_clause_LOAD_BEARING: READY_FOR_LONGER_BACKTEST is exclusively a research label
c7_verdict_semantics.rec1_equivalent_explicit_at_c7_BINDING: Per REC1-equivalent (binding): the EXPECTED OOS verdict for s13-d1 if observed IS rate falls below 25/year is INSUFFICIENT_SAMPLE / OOS_INDETERMINATE. READY_FOR_LONGER_BACKTEST at IS does NOT imply OOS will reach READY; OOS K9 is borderline at lower bound.

allowed_operational_statuses.PARKED_SAFE_BUT_INSUFFICIENT_SAMPLE_AT_I: If IS K9 fires (less likely for s13-d1 RSI but possible)
allowed_operational_statuses.PARKED_SAFE_BUT_OOS_INDETERMINATE_K9_FIR: (s13-d1 EXPECTED IF OOS K9 fires per REC1-equivalent; analogous to S10-D2 P11 PARK at 23c7164 and s12-d1 P11 PARK at ecbd001)
allowed_operational_statuses.READY_FOR_LONGER_BACKTEST: After clean Step 5.x with K9 cleared

permanent_attributes_unchanged_by_parkin: REC1-equivalent oos_k9_risk_disclosure binding (carried into any future PARK memo)
Mechanic family F3 LOCKED at PLAN
c8_candidate_lifecycle.rec1_equivalent_explicit_at_c8_BINDING: If OOS K9 fires (IS rate observed below 25/year), the operator MUST park s13-d1 under PARKED_SAFE_BUT_OOS_INDETERMINATE_K9_FIRED. Chain shall NOT relax K9.

transitions.revival_from_PARKED: requires FRESH SEALED RESEARCH CYCLE; fresh seals throughout; new plan-lock
transitions.to_any_PARKED: operator authorization required; canonical parking report at reports/external_research_hunter/<candidate>_PARKING_REPORT.md

c8_candidate_lifecycle.weak_performance_rejection_rule_LOAD_BEA: If a candidate shows decisively negative economics on meaningful sample (Sharpe < 0, expectancy <= 0, profit-loss ratio < 0.5, closed_trades >= 100), operator MUST park it. Do NOT iterate parameters. Optimization forbidden.

explicit_next_phase_requirement.p3_build_files_allowed_per_p1_section_1: 16 files (5 source + 5 test scaffold + 6 sealed build reports)
explicit_next_phase_requirement.p3_build_requires_separate_authorization: Authorize s13 D1 MNQ.c.0 P3 BUILD only

T4 Brokerage compatibility: NOT_APPLICABLE for s13-d1 (CSV simulator)
T5 Distinct run_id: confirm distinct from s12-d1 / s11-d1 / s10-d2 / all prior s13-d1 algo versions
T6 QC smoke init: NOT_APPLICABLE for s13-d1 (CSV simulator)
T7 P4 synthetic smoke (T1-T15 + T7b + T7c) per P1 plan-lock test plan
T8 Validator pass at P4 (execution_guard.full_guard_check returns overall_pass=True)
T9 Verdict semantics: READY_FOR_LONGER_BACKTEST not interpreted as live-ready; REC1-equivalent OOS K9 disclosure carried into output JSON inherited_constraints_block

report_kind: S13-D1 P2 phase-2 plan (sealed; binding; adapts C1-C8 phase-2 safety-contract template byte-equivalent for s13-d1 single-instrument futures + RSI(2) bi-directional; anchors to SEAL at 262491c (sha 2f9d176388fe0b66c9ced19f33c68e079bb08112f3d52f3f20a9aba7d91bf775) and P1 plan-lock at 005cb8a (sha 1cac253cbbbf4cdab87e777edbe0bca00739e925de382bd1d687faae9731052c); DA3=B + DA4=C + K9-reachability discipline + REC1-equivalent OOS K9 disclosure all carried binding into C6 inherited_constraints_block)
